prompt: View all delayed shipments from 'Superior Materials' and 'Reliable Suppliers Co', including order details, delivery performance, and costs.

app_definition.app_description: Detailed analysis of delayed shipments specifically for Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co, focusing on delivery performance and associated costs.

components.sql_query: SELECT COUNT(*) as delayed_count FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')
components.title: Total Delayed Orders

components.sql_query: SELECT AVG(delivery_days) as avg_days FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')
components.title: Avg. Delivery Days (Delayed)
Total Cost of Delayed Shipments
components.sql_query: SELECT SUM(total_cost) as total_cost_delayed FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')

components.title: Delayed Shipment Details
components.sql_query: SELECT order_id, order_date, supplier, product, delivery_days, total_cost, shipping_mode, defect_rate FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co')

components.title: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed)
components.sql_query: SELECT supplier, AVG(delivery_days) as avg_delivery_days FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') GROUP BY supplier

components.title: Delays by Shipping Mode
components.sql_query: SELECT shipping_mode, COUNT(*) as order_count FROM supply_chain WHERE on_time_delivery = 0 AND supplier IN ('Superior Materials', 'Reliable Suppliers Co') GROUP BY shipping_mode

components.title: Total Delayed Orders
components.explanation: Total Delayed Orders: Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Avg. Delivery Days (Delayed)
components.explanation: Avg. Delivery Days (Delayed): Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Total Cost of Delayed Shipments
components.explanation: Total Cost of Delayed Shipments: Displays a single metric value (1 data point)

components.title: Delayed Shipment Details
components.explanation: Delayed Shipment Details: Shows 145 rows across 8 columns

components.title: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed)
components.explanation: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed): Compares 2 categories

components.title: Delays by Shipping Mode
components.explanation: Delays by Shipping Mode: Breaks down into 4 segments

overview.summary: This dashboard provides a comprehensive overview of the 145 delayed shipments from Superior Materials and Reliable Suppliers Co, representing over $4.3 million in tied-up capital. It highlights that both suppliers share a similar delay profile, with average delivery times for late orders hovering around 28 days across various shipping modes.

components.title: Total Delayed Orders
components.narration: This shows you that there are currently 145 specific orders from these two suppliers that have failed to meet their delivery timelines.

components.title: Avg. Delivery Days (Delayed)
components.narration: You can see that when an order is delayed from these suppliers, it takes an average of 28.48 days to arrive, providing a benchmark for setting realistic buffer expectations.

components.title: Total Cost of Delayed Shipments
components.narration: This highlights the financial impact of the delays, showing that approximately $4.3 million worth of inventory is currently affected by late deliveries.

components.title: Delayed Shipment Details
components.narration: This table allows you to audit individual late orders, showing specific details like the product type, shipping mode, and defect rates, such as the 42-day delay for Control Systems from Superior Materials.

components.title: Average Delivery Days by Supplier (Delayed)
components.narration: This chart compares the two vendors directly, revealing that Superior Materials (28.73 days) and Reliable Suppliers Co (28.24 days) have nearly identical performance issues regarding delay duration.

components.title: Delays by Shipping Mode
components.narration: This breakdown shows that delays are relatively evenly distributed across transport types, though rail accounts for the highest volume with 42 delayed orders.
